_comment: M6 demo memory store: the shared memory items, each tagged with ONE category. This is DATA, not code -- the same philosophy as users.json (who may see what) and lineage.json (what is revoked). cli.py loads this file and runs every item through the deterministic bouncer. 'item3-summary' is DERIVED from item3 (see lineage.json) to demonstrate TRANSITIVE revocation: revoking item1 propagates item1 -> item3 -> item3-summary. JSON has no real comments, so this leading '_comment' key is ignored by the loader.

items.text: Inbound: 12 tonnes, 40 m3 of packaged goods
Summary: large inbound shipment expected this week
Contract penalty clause for late delivery
